_meta.description: Day templates. Each 'type' references exercises by ID from exercises.json — it does NOT contain exercise detail. Warmups, exercises, and cooldowns are ID lists. The schedule maps dates to these template IDs, so the same template can run on any day.

pt-glute-core.label: PT Glute & Core
pt-glute-core.note: Squeeze the RIGHT glute deliberately on every rep.

nordic-track.label: NordicTrack X24
nordic-track.ifit: Beginner / Scenic / Low-Impact / Endurance / Hill / Power (by phase)
nordic-track.note: Check seat height every session. Toe-clip straps, not SPD. Squeeze right glute on every climb. Use SmartAdjust override if anything aggravates a joint.

strength-scapula.label: Strength + Scapula
strength-scapula.note: Scapula work: pain-free range ONLY. During cycle flares, gentle retraction only — skip band/resistance work.

yoga-hatha.label: Hatha Yoga
yoga-hatha.note: Hold each pose 5–10 breaths. Props every session — bolsters, blocks, blankets. Move with your breath, not your ambition. Pivot the X24 screen off-bike to face your mat.

yoga-vinyasa.label: Vinyasa Flow
yoga-vinyasa.note: Modified Sun Salutation A — no chaturanga, ever. Flow: mountain → fold → half lift → low lunge → downward dog → repeat other side. Do 3 rounds, then settle into warrior work and floor poses. Move with your breath: inhale to lengthen, exhale to fold.

rest.label: Rest + Ankle Mob
rest.note: True rest day. Ankle mob is the one non-negotiable — even today. Optional gentle 15-min walk.
